name: Sauteed Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the zucchini and cut off the ends.
2. Grate the zucchini and place it in a colander.
3. Toss with 2 teaspoons salt and let drain for at least half an hour.
4. When ready to cook, drain well in a paper towel to remove all liquid.
5. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Saute the onion until soft.
7. Raise the heat to medium-high and add the zucchini.
8. Stir and toss constantly for 3-4 minutes, until cooked but still crisp.
9. Season with pepper, salt (if needed), lemon juice, and parsley.
10. Serve immediately.
